scripts.test:e2e: docker rm -f omiyage-db omiyage-minio omiyage-backend omiyage-frontend 2>/dev/null || true; docker compose -f ../backend/docker-compose.yml up -d && bunx playwright test; EXIT_CODE=$?; docker compose -f ../backend/docker-compose.yml down; exit $EXIT_CODE
scripts.test:e2e:ui: docker rm -f omiyage-db omiyage-minio omiyage-backend omiyage-frontend 2>/dev/null || true; docker compose -f ../backend/docker-compose.yml up -d && bunx playwright test --ui; EXIT_CODE=$?; docker compose -f ../backend/docker-compose.yml down; exit $EXIT_CODE
scripts.test:e2e:debug: docker rm -f omiyage-db omiyage-minio omiyage-backend omiyage-frontend 2>/dev/null || true; docker compose -f ../backend/docker-compose.yml up -d && bunx playwright test --debug; EXIT_CODE=$?; docker compose -f ../backend/docker-compose.yml down; exit $EXIT_CODE
